{{Quote|Put one in a pot of cold water, bring up the heat slowly, and he'll boil to death before he thinks of jumping out.|[[Yeorg Captison]]|<ref name="The Truce at Bakura">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>}}
The '''Butter Newt''' was a primitive [[Species/Legends|species]] that did not react to slow stimuli.
